generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in NATO are actually benefiting more from our defense commitments than we are? While we're spending billions to maintain our alliances, they're free to focus their budgets on domestic priorities. It's time we rethink this imbalance and ensure our national security comes first. #AllianceFairness #DefendAmericaFirst
